long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between bcr01a.che01 Et1/3 <-> bas03a.sr01.che01 Et29/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19840
short_description: bcr01a.che01 Et1/3 <-> bas03a.sr01.che01 Et29/1 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
